suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-6 launch status and readiness check
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-6 was targeted for June 10 (yesterday). Status update critical given devnet-5 instability and multiple recent failed launches.

suggestions.topic: Root cause analysis for glamsterdam devnet-5 failures
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #82 consensus was not to recover devnet-5 without understanding root cause. Multiple clients forking, Prysm sync issues, and peer downscoring need diagnosis before devnet-7.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-7 benchmarking results and final gas repricing numbers
suggestions.rationale: Benchmarking is the primary blocker for finalizing EIP-8038/2780/7904 gas costs. ACDT #81 indicated optimizations were ongoing; results needed before glamsterdam-devnet-7 scope can be finalized.
ACDT #82 decided on Option 2 (enshrine Arachnid in Genesis), but async alignment needed on whether to modify EIP-7997 or create a new EIP. Action item for Toni/Mario/frangio.
ACDT #81 deferred all EL changes (EIP-8246, EIP-2780, EIP-8038, EIP-7954, EIP-7997) to devnet-6, but devnet-6 was CL-only. Need to confirm devnet-7 will include these EIPs pending benchmark results.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7928 state-access decoupling PR review outcome
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #81 requested EL teams review PR before ACDE Thursday (June 5). No outcome reported in ACDT #82; status update needed.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API implementation progress and volunteer coordination
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #82 noted Geth/Erigon implementing, Prysm/Nimbus targeted by EF intern. Action item for additional CL client to volunteer. Progress check useful but not blocking.
Deferred to devnet-7 or devnet-8 pending EPBS stability. Since devnet-5/6 struggled, may be worth revisiting timeline expectations, but not urgent until EPBS stabilizes.
